rows.source_ref: ahmedabbas, 'Simple RSI & EMA high Profitable ratio Strategy', ForexFactory thread 599061 (2016), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/599061-simple-rsi-ema-high-profitable-ratio-strategy — origin attributed to TEB63's earlier FF thread 229238 (http://www.forexfactory.com/showthread.php?t=229238), the 'Bagovino Method', and a Thomas Carter Amazon ebook.
rows.concept: Trend-momentum: enter on an EMA5/EMA12 crossover confirmed by RSI(21) and CCI(80) on the same side of their midlines, exit on the opposite cross or an oscillator flip through 50.
rows.eligibility_reason: Fully mechanical EMA-cross + RSI/CCI momentum filter, implementable in pure MQL5, FX majors on H1/H4 available via .DWX, hard SL present (FTMO/DXZ-compatible).
rows.notes: Generic MA-cross + oscillator trend filter, no structural/uncorrelated edge (redundant with existing index/FX swing variants). Entry: EMA5 crosses EMA12 up AND RSI(21)&CCI(80)>50 (long) / down AND both<50 (short), enter on candle close. Exit: EMA5 recrosses EMA12 OR RSI&CCI flip 50. SL ~35-60 pips by pair volatility (discretionary but bounded); reference MQL4 logic posted by trenki2. Thread's OWN backtests falsify it: trenki2 EURUSD H1 2001-2016 'fails badly' with default (5,12,21)/30-pip SL, only curve-fit (136,195,191)/36-pip 'better'; xuantianfeng negative; TEB63 'I never seen an EA work with this system'. Discretionary variants folded in (not separate rows): TEB63 London-open-to-2h-before-close + candle-pattern entry + higher-TF RSI confirm + 1:3 RRR (VAGUE); emmanuel7788 multi-TF RSI-50 bias (W/D/H4 aligned) + ADR-100 stops + 50-pip-min trailing, exit on RSI-M15 reverse (PARTIAL/discretionary). Low-reputability forum source; keep only as a cheap Q02/Q04 sacrificial-crossover baseline.
